'''Ichi-Tan Micoda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A [[Jedi Consular|Jedi]] Consular, Micoda worked closely with the [[Republic Diplomatic Corps/Legends|Republic Diplomatic Corps]].
